title: GrowGeneration Reports Record Financial Results Q2 2020
text: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) announced record Q2 2020 results with revenues of $43.5 million and adjusted EBITDA of $4.6 million, marking the company's 10th consecutive quarter of record revenues. Revenue increased 123% year-over-year to $43.5 million from $19.5 million in Q2 2019. Same-store sales grew 49% to $25.1 million. The company achieved GAAP net income of $2.6 million compared to $1.1 million in the prior year quarter. Adjusted EBITDA surged 166% to $4.6 million, or $0.12 per share. Store operating costs improved significantly, declining to 9.2% of sales from 14% year-over-year. The commercial division generated over $9 million in revenue, up 142% year-over-year, while adding 167 new commercial accounts. Online business expanded 149%. The company's private-label Sunleaves nutrient line exceeded $100,000 in monthly sales. GrowGeneration operated 28 locations across multiple states and surpassed $100 million in year-to-date revenues by August 10, 2020. The company increased 2020 revenue guidance to $170-$175 million with adjusted EBITDA of $17.0-$18.0 million. For 2021, management projects revenues of $245-$260 million with adjusted EBITDA of $26.0-$28.0 million.
